full_text:
Wu Jing 吳景
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Jing (吳景). Lady Wu’s younger brother. Served Sun Jian, then Yuan Shu, then Sun Ce. Wu Jing was affiliated with Yuan Shu and the Wu Kingdom. Wu Jing lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
